_comment: Apply with: aws codebuild update-project --cli-input-json file://ops/codebuild/intelliverse-nakama-build.update.json --region us-east-1
_changes_from_live_2026_04_17: source.buildspec: '' (was inline blob) -> CodeBuild now reads buildspec.yml from repo root.
environment.privilegedMode: true (was false) -> required for `docker build` inside CodeBuild.
environment.environmentVariables: removed DOCKER_USERNAME / DOCKER_PASSWORD (plaintext creds) -> ECR auth is the only registry we push to; Docker Hub login is not needed.

environment.environmentVariables: added EKS_CLUSTER_NAME / K8S_NAMESPACE / K8S_DEPLOYMENT / K8S_CONTAINER / ECR_REPOSITORY -> explicit knobs reviewable here AND in buildspec.yml; if they ever drift, we want to notice.
environment.image: bumped to standard:7.0 -> ships with docker 24, kubectl-friendly TLS, and is still in support.
cache: LOCAL DOCKER_LAYER_CACHE -> faster image builds across runs.
everything else (artifacts, serviceRole, timeoutInMinutes, source.type=CODEPIPELINE, logsConfig, KMS key) preserved as-is.
name: intelliverse-nakama-build
